name: productivity-tools
description: Read-only daily Gmail, Calendar, and Todoist briefs plus Todoist task planning.

interface.shortDescription: Daily briefs with Todoist and calendar planning.
interface.longDescription: Adds a read-only daily command center across Gmail, Google Calendar, and Todoist while retaining Todoist's official hosted MCP and the separate task-planning workflow for explicit task, meeting, and time-block changes.
defaultPrompt: Use $daily-command-center to prepare my read-only daily brief.
Use $todoist-task-planning to capture this task with the right deadline and details.
Use $todoist-task-planning to review my Todoist tasks and plan only explicit work blocks on Google Calendar.
